# Ansiversa Full Public AI Context

> One consistent platform for focused everyday solution apps.

Official description: A permanently curated ecosystem of exactly 100 solution apps.
Catalog size: 100 public solution apps.

## Categories

- Business & UAE (cat_business-and-uae)
- Career & Professional (cat_career)
- Content & AI Writing (cat_writing)
- Daily Life (cat_daily-life)
- Documents & Records (cat_documents-and-records)
- Health & Medical (cat_health-and-medical)
- Home & Family (cat_home-and-family)
- Learning & Education (cat_learning)
- Mobility & Travel (cat_mobility-and-travel)
- Personal Finance (cat_personal-finance)
- Personal Life & Wellness (cat_lifestyle)
- Utilities & Productivity (cat_utility)
- Vehicle & Driving (cat_vehicle-and-driving)
- Work & Planning (cat_work-and-planning)

## Public Pages

### 100 carefully curated apps. One consistent platform.
- URL: https://ansiversa.com
- Summary: Learn, plan, create, manage, and solve everyday needs with one account across a fixed ecosystem of 100 useful apps.

### About
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/about
- Summary: About is an Ansiversa public page.

### Apps
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/apps
- Summary: Apps is an Ansiversa public page.

### One subscription. 100 curated apps.
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/pricing
- Summary: Start free with focused access, then choose a simple Individual plan when you are ready for the full Ansiversa ecosystem.

### Privacy
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/privacy
- Summary: Privacy is an Ansiversa public page.

### Terms
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/terms
- Summary: Terms is an Ansiversa public page.

### FAQ
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/faq
- Summary: Frequently asked questions

### Contact
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/contact
- Summary: Contact the Ansiversa team

## Public Apps

### Quiz
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/quiz
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Build clean, focused quizzes that feel premium to take and effortless to manage. Pick a topic, run the quiz, and store results automatically.
- Audience: Schools & teachers, Coaching institutes, Teams & HR, Self learners
- Aliases: quiz, learning & education
- Capabilities: Structured taxonomy: platform → subject → topic → roadmap; Instant scoring with server-ready breakdown; Attempts saved per user for progress tracking; Turn notes into recall-ready prompts. — Teach with notes, then convert them into instant quizzes.; Scale up to timed mock exams. — Start with quizzes, then build full exam flows.; Bring quizzes into live battles. — Use quiz content for fast, competitive revisions.; Roadmap-first taxonomy: platform → subject → topic → roadmap.; Results designed to save per user with full answer review.
- Related apps: Research Assistant, AI Notes Summarizer, Concept Explainer

### Research Assistant
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/research-assistant
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Collect research topics, organize manual notes, save references, and track progress in one focused workspace.
- Audience: Students, Self learners, Professionals
- Aliases: research assistant, learning & education, research, assistant
- Capabilities: Create research topics; Add manual notes; Track references and status; Research topic — Store the title, question, summary, and progress status.; Notes — Add ordered findings that belong to the topic.; References — Save source titles, links, and context notes.
- Related apps: Quiz, AI Notes Summarizer, Concept Explainer

### AI Notes Summarizer
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/ai-notes-summarizer
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Turn long notes into focused summaries with key points, action items, and saved document history.
- Audience: Students, Professionals, Researchers
- Aliases: ai notes summarizer, learning & education, ai, notes, summarizer, summarize notes, note summary
- Capabilities: Paste long notes; Generate summary; Review key points and actions; Source notes — Provide the full notes that need summarizing.; Clear summary — Condense the material into key points and actions.; Review history — Return to saved documents and previous summaries.
- Related apps: Research Assistant, Concept Explainer, Quiz

### Concept Explainer
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/concept-explainer
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Break difficult ideas into clear explanation steps and review checks you create manually.
- Audience: Students, Self learners, Professionals
- Aliases: concept explainer, learning & education, concept, explainer
- Capabilities: Create a concept; Build explanation steps; Review with check questions; Concept record — Store the title, topic, and short context.; Explanation steps — Add the ordered pieces that explain the idea.; Check questions — Create simple prompts and expected answers for review.
- Related apps: AI Notes Summarizer, Study Planner, Research Assistant

### Study Planner
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/study-planner
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Create a study plan, break it into tasks, log focused study sessions, and review progress.
- Audience: Students, Self-learners, Professionals
- Aliases: study planner, learning & education, study, planner
- Capabilities: Plan learning goals; Track study tasks; Review logged progress; Study plans — Create current-user plans with subjects, goals, dates, and status.; Study tasks — Add prioritized tasks under plans and update task status.; Study logs — Record focused minutes and reflections for progress review.; Protected API routes under /api/v1/study-planner.; Current-user owned StudyPlans, StudyPlanTasks, and StudyLogs tables.
- Related apps: Concept Explainer, Course Tracker, AI Notes Summarizer

### Course Tracker
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/course-tracker
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Create courses, organize modules, log learning progress, and review completion.
- Audience: Students, Online learners, Professionals
- Aliases: course tracker, learning & education, course, tracker
- Capabilities: Create course records; Manage learning modules; Review completion progress; Courses — Create protected course records with goals, dates, and status.; Course modules — Add ordered modules under courses and update progress status.; Progress logs — Record minutes, summaries, and reflections for completion review.; Protected API routes under /api/v1/course-tracker.; Current-user owned Courses, CourseModules, and CourseProgressLogs tables.
- Related apps: Study Planner, Dictionary+, Concept Explainer

### Dictionary+
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/dictionary-plus
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Look up words and review clear definitions with phonetic guidance.
- Audience: Students, Writers, Language learners
- Aliases: dictionary+, dictionary plus, learning & education, dictionary, plus
- Capabilities: Instant word lookup; Clear definitions; Phonetic guidance; Word lookup — Find the word you need to understand.; Definition — Review its meaning in a readable format.; Phonetics — Use phonetic spelling to guide pronunciation.; Definition and phonetic-ready lookup flow.; Responsive presentation across devices.
- Related apps: Course Tracker, Formula Finder, Study Planner

### Formula Finder
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/formula-finder
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Search bundled formulas, explore clear explanations, and save useful references in your browser.
- Audience: Students, Educators, Professionals
- Aliases: formula finder, learning & education, formula, finder
- Capabilities: 25 bundled formulas; Search and category filtering; Browser-local favorites; Bundled reference data — Explore 25 formulas across five subject categories.; Focused filtering — Search reference fields and narrow results by category.; Local favorites — Store only favorite formula IDs in this browser.; Metadata-driven overview content.; Bundled browser reference data with local favorites.
- Related apps: Dictionary+, Lesson Builder, Course Tracker

### Lesson Builder
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/lesson-builder
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Build structured lesson plans quickly with clear objectives, activities, and review points.
- Audience: Teachers, Tutors, Trainers
- Aliases: lesson builder, learning & education, lesson, builder
- Capabilities: Structured lesson plans; Clear learning objectives; Organized activities; Learning objective — Define the outcome the lesson should support.; Activity sequence — Organize the work learners will complete.; Lesson review — Check alignment before using the plan.; Objective and activity-ready planning structure.; Responsive presentation across devices.
- Related apps: Formula Finder, Memory Trainer, Dictionary+

### Memory Trainer
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/memory-trainer
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Create memory sessions, recall generated sequences, review performance, and track progress.
- Audience: Students, Curious learners, Everyday users
- Aliases: memory trainer, learning & education, memory, trainer
- Capabilities: Memory sessions; Sequence recall; Progress tracking; Memory games — Define reusable recall challenges.; Focused rounds — Persist each sequence, answer, and result.; Progress summary — Track completed sessions and best accuracy.; Responsive presentation across devices.
- Related apps: Lesson Builder, Daily Word Challenge, Formula Finder

### Daily Word Challenge
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/daily-word-challenge
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Discover one deterministic daily word, explore vocabulary, and track learning progress in your browser.
- Audience: Students, Writers, Curious learners
- Aliases: daily word challenge, learning & education, daily, word, challenge
- Capabilities: 20 bundled words; Deterministic daily challenge; Browser-local learning progress; Bundled words — Explore 20 words across three difficulty levels.; Daily challenge — Receive one deterministic word for the local date.; Local progress — Store learned word IDs and current streak progress in this browser.; Metadata-driven overview content.; Deterministic daily selection with date-based browser progress.
- Related apps: Memory Trainer, Smart Textbook Scanner, Lesson Builder

### Smart Textbook Scanner
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/smart-textbook-scanner
- Category: Learning & Education
- Purpose: Scan textbook material, organize pages, extract notes, and review focused study points.
- Audience: Students, Educators, Self learners
- Aliases: smart textbook scanner, learning & education, smart, textbook, scanner
- Capabilities: Create textbook scans; Organize scanned pages; Extract review notes; Textbook scans — Create protected scan records with subject, source, goal, and status.; Textbook pages — Organize page text and page numbers under each scan.; Extracted notes — Capture headings, key points, summaries, and note types for review.; Protected API routes under /api/v1/smart-textbook-scanner.; Current-user owned TextbookScans, TextbookPages, and ExtractedNotes tables.
- Related apps: Daily Word Challenge, Memory Trainer, Lesson Builder

### Resume Builder
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/resume-builder
- Category: Career & Professional
- Purpose: Build ATS-safe resume projects with organized sections, reusable resume items, preview, and completion review.
- Audience: Students, Job seekers, Professionals
- Aliases: resume builder, career & professional, resume, builder
- Capabilities: Resume project workspace; Section-based resume structure; Preview and completion review; Create the resume container. — Each resume starts as a project tied to the current user.; Shape the resume structure. — Enabled sections define what appears in the preview.; Add resume content. — Items hold the user-authored resume details.; Reuses existing ResumeProject, ResumeSection, and ResumeItem tables.; Keeps Bookmark, Faq, and _astro_db_snapshot untouched.
- Related apps: Visiting Card Maker, Interview Coach, Job Description Analyzer

- Audience: Individuals, Families and teams, Power users

- URL: https://ansiversa.com/qr-code-creator
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Turn text and URLs into downloadable QR codes directly in your browser.
- Audience: Professionals, Small businesses, Everyday users
- Aliases: qr code creator, utilities & productivity, qr, code, creator, qr code
- Capabilities: Text and URL QR generation; Live preview and PNG download; Browser-only processing with no saved content; Text and URLs — Provide the content the QR code should contain.; Live preview — Review size and color changes instantly.; PNG download — Save the completed QR code locally.; Metadata-driven overview content.; Browser-only QR generation with no saved content.
- Related apps: Price Checker, Clipboard Manager, Snippet Generator

### Clipboard Manager
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/clipboard-manager

- Audience: Professionals, Developers, Privacy-conscious users
- Aliases: clipboard manager, utilities & productivity, clipboard, manager
- Capabilities: Browser-local history; Manual paste fallback; Workspace — Add and save text entries with optional labels.; History — Search, copy, delete, and clear local entries.; Insights — View total entries, recent saves, longest entry, and copy activity.
- Related apps: QR Code Creator, Password Generator, Price Checker

### Password Generator
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/password-generator
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Generate strong, customizable passwords securely in your browser.
- Audience: Professionals, Technical teams, Everyday users, Developers
- Aliases: password generator, utilities & productivity, password, generator
- Capabilities: Browser-only password generation; Custom length and character sets; Strength review before copying; Custom length — Choose a password length that fits your security needs.; Character sets — Include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.; Strength check — Review whether the generated password is weak, medium, strong, or very strong.; Runs entirely in the browser with no server dependency.; Uses secure browser randomness for password generation.
- Related apps: Clipboard Manager, API Tester, QR Code Creator

### API Tester
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/api-tester
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Save and run lightweight API requests from the browser without sending URLs, headers, tokens, or payloads through Ansiversa servers.
- Audience: Developers, Technical teams, Learners
- Aliases: api tester, utilities & productivity, api, tester
- Capabilities: Browser-local requests; Explicit fetch runs; Local run history; Request — Method, URL, headers, and body saved in browser storage.; Run — Explicit browser fetch execution when the target API allows cross-origin calls.; History — Status, timing, and previews stored locally for later review.
- Related apps: Password Generator, JSON Formatter, Clipboard Manager

### JSON Formatter
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/json-formatter
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Format, validate, and organize JSON through a focused editing workflow.
- Audience: Developers, Technical teams, API testers, Learners
- Aliases: json formatter, utilities & productivity, json, formatter, json validator, format json
- Capabilities: Format and beautify JSON; Minify large JSON payloads; Validate JSON instantly; Format JSON — Beautify compact JSON into a readable structure.; Minify JSON — Reduce whitespace and line breaks for compact output.; Validate JSON — Confirm that JSON syntax is correct before use.; Runs entirely in the browser with no server dependency.; Supports formatting, minification, and validation workflows.
- Related apps: API Tester, Markdown Editor, Password Generator

### Markdown Editor
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/markdown-editor
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Write Markdown, preview the rendered result, and export reusable documents directly in your browser.
- Audience: Developers, Technical writers, Students and creators
- Aliases: markdown editor, utilities & productivity, markdown, editor
- Capabilities: Browser-only Markdown editing; Live rendered preview; Markdown and HTML export; Live preview — Render common Markdown structures immediately.; Document statistics — Track characters, words, and lines in realtime.; Browser exports — Download Markdown and HTML files without a server.; Metadata-driven overview content.; Safe browser-only Markdown rendering with no saved history.
- Related apps: JSON Formatter, Time Zone Scheduler, API Tester

### Time Zone Scheduler
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/time-zone-scheduler
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Compare one meeting time across participant time zones and save lightweight schedules in your browser.
- Audience: Remote teams, Recruiters, Freelancers
- Aliases: time zone scheduler, utilities & productivity, time, zone, scheduler
- Capabilities: Browser-local schedules; My Time highlight; Native time-zone conversion; Schedule — Title, base date, base time, and base time zone.; Participants — Multiple IANA time-zone names included in the comparison.; Insights — Local totals, unique zones, most-used zone, average participants, and recent schedules.
- Related apps: Markdown Editor, Browser PDF Reader, JSON Formatter

### Browser PDF Reader
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/browser-pdf-reader
- Category: Utilities & Productivity
- Purpose: Open local PDFs in the browser and save lightweight reading-session metadata without uploading documents.
- Audience: Students, Professionals, Privacy-conscious users
- Aliases: browser pdf reader, utilities & productivity, browser, pdf, reader
- Capabilities: Local PDF viewing; Metadata-only sessions; Workspace — Select a PDF, view it, navigate pages, and set zoom.; History — Search, edit, reopen, delete, or clear local reading sessions.; Insights — Review total documents, pages viewed, average pages, and recent sessions.
- Related apps: Time Zone Scheduler, Markdown Editor, JSON Formatter

### Meal Planner
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/meal-planner
- Category: Personal Life & Wellness
- Purpose: Create practical weekly meal plans and keep everyday food decisions organized.
- Audience: Individuals, Families, Busy households
- Aliases: meal planner, personal life & wellness, meal, planner
- Capabilities: Reusable recipes; Weekly meal plans; Calendar scheduling; Recipe ideas — Maintain a useful set of reusable options.; Weekly plans — Create a plan for each week you want to organize.; Calendar review — See what is planned for each date and meal type.; Protected recipe, plan, and calendar workflow.; Responsive presentation across devices.
- Related apps: Wellness and Goal Planner, Fitness Tracker, Mood Journal

- Audience: Individuals, Routine builders, Wellness organizers
- Aliases: water intake tracker, health & medical, water, intake, tracker
- Capabilities: Daily entries; Personal goals; Weekly and monthly summaries; Entries — Create, edit, delete, search, and filter water intake records.; Goals — Set a personal daily goal and preferred unit.; Insights — Review today's intake, weekly/monthly averages, best day, streak, trend, and drink type totals.
- Related apps: Doctor Visit Tracker, Vaccination Tracker, Symptom Journal

### Vaccination Tracker
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/vaccination-tracker
- Category: Health & Medical
- Purpose: Organize vaccination profiles, dose records, upcoming due dates, and multi-dose progress in a private record-keeping workspace.
- Audience: Parents, Adults, Families
- Aliases: vaccination tracker, health & medical, vaccination, tracker
- Capabilities: Profiles; Dose records; Upcoming and overdue review; Profiles — Create, edit, archive, restore, and delete profiles when safe.; Vaccines — Use default organizational labels or add custom vaccine types.; Records — Create, edit, archive, restore, delete, search, filter, and sort vaccination records.; Insights — Review records by vaccine, profile, status, and year with recent activity.
- Related apps: Water Intake Tracker, Symptom Journal, Doctor Visit Tracker

### Symptom Journal
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/symptom-journal
- Category: Health & Medical
- Purpose: Record personal health observations, symptom patterns, severity, triggers, and follow-up notes over time without diagnosis or treatment advice.
- Audience: Adults, Caregivers, Appointment preparation
- Aliases: symptom journal, health & medical, symptom, journal
- Capabilities: Personal journal; Severity and triggers; History review; Categories — Use default organizational labels or create custom symptom categories.; Entries — Create, edit, archive, restore, delete, search, filter, and sort journal entries.; Follow-up notes — Add additional context after the original entry.; Insights — Review counts, average severity, common categories, body areas, recurring titles, and recent entries.
- Related apps: Vaccination Tracker, First Aid Guide, Water Intake Tracker

### First Aid Guide
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/first-aid-guide
- Category: Health & Medical
- Purpose: Browse concise educational first-aid reference topics, warning notes, prevention tips, bookmarks, and recently viewed guides. Not a substitute for emergency services or professional care.

- Capabilities: Educational topics; Bookmarks; Emergency warning notes; Guides — Browse topics with summaries, steps, avoid lists, emergency warnings, prevention, and related topics.; Categories — Review organizational categories for first-aid reference topics.; Bookmarks — Save favourite guides for quick access.; Insights — Review recently viewed, favourite, and most-viewed topics from personal history.; System-managed categories and guide content.

- Capabilities: Log fuel purchases by vehicle; Review total and monthly fuel costs; Compare station and vehicle spending; Vehicles — Name, fuel type, odometer unit, and archive status.; Entries — Purchase date, odometer, quantity, cost, station, payment method, and notes.; Insights — Monthly cost, vehicle spend, station frequency, and recent purchases.; Coming-soon catalog status preserved until manual verification approves launch.
- Related apps: Driver Logbook, Vehicle Document Tracker

- Purpose: Record personal driving trips, vehicles, odometer readings, purposes, locations, and distance summaries from your own driving records.
- Audience: Personal drivers, Households, Record keepers

- Related apps: Shift Planner, Leave Planner, Meeting Scheduler

### Bill Splitter
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/bill-splitter
- Category: Personal Finance
- Purpose: Build a private bill, allocate item-level costs, and record settlement progress without moving money.
- Audience: Friends, Households, Trip groups
- Aliases: bill splitter, personal finance, bill, splitter
- Capabilities: Equal, single, and custom splits; Deterministic cent reconciliation; Private settlement records; Participants — Names, optional email, notes, shares, and paid amounts.; Items — Quantity, unit price, line total, and allocation method.; History — Search, filters, pagination, direct details, and durable refresh.; Decimal arithmetic is authoritative; floating point is presentation-only.; Nested records cascade only with their owning bill.
- Related apps: Savings Goal Planner, Salary Breakdown Calculator, Net Worth Tracker

### Savings Goal Planner
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/savings-goal-planner
- Category: Personal Finance
- Purpose: Track private fixed-currency savings targets, contributions, milestones, and transparent deadline pace.
- Audience: Individuals, Families, Travellers and makers
- Aliases: savings goal planner, personal finance, savings, goal, planner
- Capabilities: Contribution and correction history; Goal milestones; Per-currency summaries; Goals — Target, starting balance, deadline, priority, and state.; Transactions — Dated contribution and correction history.; Milestones — Derived reached, pending, and missed stages.; Three cascade-linked application tables.; Two-decimal half-up authoritative arithmetic.
- Related apps: Bill Splitter, Salary Breakdown Calculator, Net Worth Tracker

### Salary Breakdown Calculator
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/salary-breakdown-calculator
- Category: Personal Finance
- Purpose: Model private salary scenarios with explicit frequency normalization, recurring and one-time components, and estimated net pay.
- Audience: Job seekers, Professionals, Budget planners
- Aliases: salary breakdown calculator, personal finance, salary, breakdown, calculator, pay, income, gross salary, net salary, allowance, deduction
- Capabilities: Six pay frequencies; Fixed and percentage deductions; Factual scenario comparison; Scenarios — Base salary, currency, period, and work assumptions.; Components — Recurring and one-time earnings and deductions.; Comparison — Factual side-by-side values without recommendations.; Three cascade-linked app tables.; Stable operation IDs and generated contracts.
- Related apps: Savings Goal Planner, Net Worth Tracker, Bill Splitter

- Category: Personal Finance
- Purpose: Record private assets and liabilities, preserve balance history, and compare immutable snapshots by currency.
- Audience: Individuals, Households, Planners
- Aliases: net worth tracker, personal finance, net, worth, tracker
- Capabilities: Manual asset and liability accounts; Immutable dated snapshots; Currency-separated net worth; Accounts — Assets and liabilities with inclusion and archive controls.; Balance history — Dated authoritative values with recalculation.; Snapshots — Immutable captured balances and currency-separated totals.; Four isolated app tables.; History-aware deletion and archived read-only rules.
- Related apps: Salary Breakdown Calculator, Savings Goal Planner, Bill Splitter

### Decision Maker
- URL: https://ansiversa.com/decision-maker
- Category: Daily Life
- Purpose: Compare real options with criteria, weights, ratings, and transparent results while keeping human judgment in control.
- Audience: Professionals, Consumers, Planners
- Aliases: decision maker, daily life, decision, maker
- Capabilities: Weighted criteria; Complete-option ranking; Neutral final selection; Options — Alternatives with context and trade-offs.; Criteria — Positive weights, normalized shares, and higher/lower direction.; Results — Completion, contributions, scores, ties, ranking, and selection.; Four cascade-linked app tables.; Decimal scoring and stable generated contracts.
- Related apps: Errand Planner, Local Services Finder, Emergency Checklist

- Related apps: Decision Maker, Local Services Finder, Emergency Checklist
